steps.title: Spot the comprehensive claim
steps.content: The student claims that congestion worsened over time in all three areas — both smaller cities and the large city of NYC.

steps.title: Apply the claim to the data
steps.content: The graph shows traffic delay increased in all three urban areas from 1990 to 2000, confirming that congestion worsened everywhere during this period. The other choices either miss the overall worsening trend, misstate geographic relationships, or focus on single data points. That matches choice A — A is correct.
